title: Felix Argyle Totem:3
description: Replaces the totem of undying texture and sound with Felix Argyle
body:
Felix Argyle Totem
​This resource pack replaces the standard Totem of Undying with the character Felix Argyle (Ferris) from Re:Zero.
​Features:
​Custom Texture: In-game totem features a detailed illustration of Felix in his classic outfit.
​Custom Sound: Includes a unique audio effect that plays when the totem is activated.
​Compatibility: Works on version 1.21.11 and is compatible with mobile launchers like Zalith or PojavLauncher
